name: economic-x-ray-vision
description: Local-first constraint intelligence engine for mapping recurring bottlenecks, validation gaps, and intervention paths across strategic operating systems.

scripts.dataset: npm run build:data && node scripts/build-dataset.ts && node scripts/audit-dataset.ts && node scripts/export-dataset.ts
scripts.evidence: npm run dataset && node scripts/build-evidence-dossiers.ts && node scripts/audit-evidence.ts
scripts.sources: npm run evidence && node scripts/build-evidence-packs.ts && node scripts/audit-sources.ts
scripts.intervention: npm run sources && node scripts/build-interventions.ts && node scripts/audit-interventions.ts
scripts.archetype: npm run intervention && node scripts/build-archetype-analysis.ts && node scripts/audit-archetypes.ts
scripts.network: npm run archetype && node scripts/build-network.ts && node scripts/audit-network.ts
scripts.tasks: npm run network && node scripts/build-validation-tasks.ts && node scripts/audit-validation-tasks.ts
scripts.triage: npm run tasks && node scripts/build-validation-triage.ts && node scripts/audit-validation-triage.ts
scripts.evidence-imports: npm run artifacts && node scripts/build-evidence-imports.ts && node scripts/audit-evidence-imports.ts
scripts.campaigns: npm run evidence-matches && node scripts/build-validation-campaigns.ts && node scripts/audit-validation-campaigns.ts
scripts.reports: npm run campaigns && node scripts/build-reports.ts && node scripts/audit-reports.ts
scripts.case-studies: npm run reports && node scripts/build-case-studies.ts && node scripts/audit-case-studies.ts
scripts.analyst-state: npm run campaigns && node scripts/build-analyst-state-template.ts && node scripts/audit-analyst-state.ts
scripts.sqlite: npm run sqlite:build && npm run sqlite:audit && npm run sqlite:inspect && npm run sqlite:parity
scripts.check: npm run validate && npm run build:data && npm run dataset && npm run evidence && npm run sources && npm run intervention && npm run archetype && npm run network && node scripts/build-validation-tasks.ts && node scripts/audit-validation-tasks.ts && node scripts/build-validation-triage.ts && node scripts/audit-validation-triage.ts && node scripts/build-validation-evidence-packets.ts && node scripts/audit-validation-evidence-packets.ts && node scripts/build-evidence-artifact-library.ts && node scripts/audit-evidence-artifact-library.ts && node scripts/build-evidence-imports.ts && node scripts/audit-evidence-imports.ts && node scripts/build-evidence-artifact-matches.ts && node scripts/audit-evidence-artifact-matches.ts && node scripts/build-validation-campaigns.ts && node scripts/audit-validation-campaigns.ts && node scripts/build-reports.ts && node scripts/audit-reports.ts && node scripts/build-case-studies.ts && node scripts/audit-case-studies.ts && node scripts/build-analyst-state-template.ts && node scripts/audit-analyst-state.ts && node scripts/audit-coverage-density.ts && node --no-warnings scripts/build-sqlite.ts && npm run sqlite:audit && npm run sqlite:inspect && npm run sqlite:parity && npm run lint && npm run build
